title: CoordinationIntent
description: A SIMP meta-work intent emitted by coordination agents (CoWork, Perplexity). Describes system improvements, test results, proposals, and handoffs. intent_type is always 'coordination' and must never trigger trade execution.

coordination_id.description: Unique ID for this coordination entry (UUID4 hex prefixed with 'coord-')

originator.description: Agent ID or coordination agent name that produced this intent

summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the coordination action

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of intent creation

affected_agents.description: SIMP agent IDs affected by this coordination action

affected_files.description: Relative file paths in the SIMP repo affected by this action

roadmap_items.description: Roadmap items (from HEARTBEAT.md or PROGRESS.md) addressed

requires_human_review.description: If True, a human must review before this change can be applied

git_branch.description: Git branch name for this change, if applicable

git_commit.description: Git commit hash, populated after merge

details.description: Freeform key-value payload for category-specific detail

intent_type.description: Always 'coordination'. Must never be changed to a trade type.

source_agent.description: SIMP source_agent field — mirrors originator for broker compatibility

target_agent.description: SIMP target_agent field — defaults to simp_router for logging
